title: Pregnancy test pigs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Pregnancy test pigs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for pregnancy testing

pcs.text: Compose pregnancy testing documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compose pregnancy testing documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compose pregnancy testing documentation according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Identify pigs to be tested according to the breeding program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pigs to be tested according to the breeding program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pigs to be tested according to the breeding program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare testing equipment and resources.

pcs.text: Follow workplace hygiene and animal welfare practices, and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace hygiene and animal welfare practices, and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply knowledge of relevant anatomy and physiology to use ultrasound equipment for pregnancy diagnosis.

pcs.text: Identify pigs as pregnant or not pregnant according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pigs as pregnant or not pregnant according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete required records and report outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete required records and report outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete required records and report outcomes.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record individual pig health and condition for input to herd health management.
